criteria.criterion: DBB-001: Cross-backend tests cover all 6 backends
DBB-002: All backends pass identical get/set/delete/list/scan tests
DBB-003: Edge-case tests cover all 6 backends
DBB-004: Edge-case tests cover special characters
DBB-005: Edge-case tests cover concurrent writes (10+ files)
DBB-006: Edge-case tests cover race conditions
DBB-007: Edge-case tests cover empty path validation
DBB-008: README performance table has all required columns
DBB-009: README browser support matrix is complete
DBB-010: README custom storage example uses correct scan() signature with line field
